task.objective: Write standalone documentation for each of the 6 pipeline phases
instructions: Query knowledge cache for each phase's details from ARCHITECTURE.md
Create docs/phase1-deep-research.md — expand Phase 1 section into standalone guide
Create docs/phase2-schema-decomposition.md — expand Phase 2 with schema examples
Create docs/phase3-n8n-orchestration.md — expand Phase 3 with setup walkthrough
Create docs/phase4-model-routing.md — expand Phase 4 with routing decision trees
Create docs/phase5-mcp-execution.md — expand Phase 5 with TypeScript wrapper examples
Create docs/phase6-security.md — expand Phase 6 with threat mitigations
Each doc should be 300-600 lines, include code examples, and cross-reference other phases
context_queries: What does Phase 1 Deep Research cover in the architecture?
What does Phase 6 Security & Governance cover?

task.objective: Write report.schema.json and routing-config.schema.json matching existing schema style
instructions: Read schemas/task-blueprint.schema.json for style reference
Read templates/worker-prompt.md for the report format specification
Create schemas/report.schema.json — validate the worker report structure (status, files_changed, cross_stream_alerts, etc.)
Query knowledge cache for Phase 4 model routing details
Create schemas/routing-config.schema.json — validate routing configuration (tiers, models, cost thresholds, fallback rules)
Both schemas must use JSON Schema draft-07 and follow the same conventions as task-blueprint.schema.json
context_queries: What fields are in the worker report format?
What is the 3-tier model routing configuration structure?

task.objective: Write redteam-prompt.md and task-file.md prompt templates
instructions: Read templates/orchestrator-prompt.md and templates/worker-prompt.md for style/format reference
Query knowledge cache for Red Team agent role and responsibilities
Create templates/redteam-prompt.md — system prompt for the critic/QA agent (Node 5). Role: find unsupported claims, check cross-references, verify citations against cache, adversarial review

Create templates/task-file.md — human-readable task dispatch template. This is NOT a system prompt — it's a markdown template that maps to task-blueprint.schema.json fields, used for dispatching tasks to workers in readable form
Both templates should use [BRACKET] placeholders like the existing templates
context_queries: What is the Red Team agent's role in the pipeline?
What fields are in the task blueprint schema?

task.objective: Write threat-model.md, rbac-config.md, and hitl-gates.md security documentation
instructions: Query knowledge cache for all Phase 6 Security & Governance details
Query knowledge cache for GTG-1002 security lessons

Create security/threat-model.md — full threat analysis expanding the threat table from ARCHITECTURE.md. Include: each threat vector, attack scenarios, likelihood, impact, mitigation strategies, detection methods

Create security/rbac-config.md — per-node permission matrix with YAML examples. Cover orchestrator, workers (1-4), and red team. Include: read/write/execute scopes, forbidden operations, escalation procedures
Create security/hitl-gates.md — human-in-the-loop checkpoint definitions. Include: trigger conditions, approval workflows, Discord notification format, timeout behavior, override procedures
context_queries: What are all the threat vectors listed in Phase 6?
What RBAC configuration is shown in the architecture?

task.objective: Research N8n workflow JSON format and write 4 exportable workflow files
instructions: Research actual N8n workflow JSON export structure (use web search)
Query knowledge cache for all 4 workflow descriptions in Phase 3
Create workflows/n8n-fanout-fanin.json — Fan-Out/Fan-In parallel execution workflow with file watcher trigger, JSON parse, sub-workflow dispatch, completion gate, Discord notification
Create workflows/n8n-delegation-chain.json — Automated delegation chain with file watcher on reports/, status parsing, conditional next-task dispatch
Create workflows/n8n-cache-monitor.json — Scheduled cache health check (90 min interval), Discord alert on missing caches
Create workflows/n8n-audit-trail.json — Git commit automation triggered by PASS report files
All workflows must be valid N8n JSON format importable via N8n UI
context_queries: What are the 4 N8n workflows described in Phase 3?
What triggers and actions does each workflow use?

task.objective: Create .gitignore and MIT LICENSE file for the repository
instructions: Create .gitignore covering: Node.js/TypeScript (node_modules, dist, .tsbuildinfo), Python (.venv, __pycache__, .pyc), AI pipeline specifics (*.log, audit.log, .env, *.secret), OS files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db), IDE (.vscode/, .idea/), N8n local data, /tmp/
Create LICENSE file with MIT license, year 2026, copyright holder 'ai-agent-pipeline contributors'
